# Synthetic Junos display-inheritance sample with clear effective inherited evidence.
# This file is intentionally not parsed as deterministic evidence until inheritance support is implemented.
[USER_1]@[HOST_1]> show configuration | display inheritance | no-more
inheritance-source [GROUP_1]
effective-statement system services ssh source-group [GROUP_1]
effective-statement system services telnet absent source-group [GROUP_1]
effective-statement system syslog host [IP_1] source-group [GROUP_1]
effective-statement system ntp server [IP_2] source-group [GROUP_1]
effective-statement snmp community [COMMUNITY_1] authorization read-only source-group [GROUP_1]
effective-statement firewall family inet filter [FILTER_1] term allow-mgmt from source-prefix-list [PREFIX_LIST_1] source-group [GROUP_1]

[USER_1]@[HOST_1]>
